intended_use: DreaMed Advisor Pro is a decision-support software intended for assisting healthcare professionals in the management of patients with Type 1 diabetes who: use insulin pumps as their insulin delivery t
intended_use_full: DreaMed Advisor Pro is a decision-support software intended for assisting healthcare professionals in the management of patients with Type 1 diabetes who: use insulin pumps as their insulin delivery therapy; monitor their glucose levels using CGM and/or self-management blood glucose meter; are above the age of 6 and under 65 years old; and use rapid acting U-100 insulin analogs in their pump. DreaMed Advisor Pro is indicated for use by healthcare professionals when analyzing continuous glucose monitoring (CGM), self-monitoring blood glucose (SMBG) and pump data to generate recommendations for optimizing a patient's insulin pump settings for basal rate, carbohydrate ratio (CR), and correction factor (CF); without considering the full clinical status of a particular patient. DreaMed Advisor Pro does not replace clinical judgement.
target_condition: Type 1 diabetes mellitus requiring insulin pump therapy
ground_truth: Recommendations provided by 17 expert physicians in diabetes management from leading diabetes centers
other_metrics: High level of agreement between DreaMed Advisor Pro recommendations and expert recommendations for basal rate, carbohydrate ratio (CR), and correction factor (CF) with regards to direction of change; recommendations of DreaMed Advisor Pro based on SMBG data alone were significantly as good as recommendations of experts
